name: LoomDeploy
description: Promote content between two stages of a CSA Loom deployment pipeline via the Loom REST API (Azure-native parity for Fabric deployment pipelines). Talks only to your own Loom Console — never api.fabric.microsoft.com.
helpMarkDown: Requires the Loom Console deployed with `loomPipelineCiEnabled=true` and a Bearer token (`LOOM_CI_TOKEN`, or `LOOM_INTERNAL_TOKEN` when that is unset). Pass the token via a **secret** pipeline variable. See tools/ado-loom-task/README.md.
author: CSA Loom

inputs.name: loomBaseUrl
inputs.label: Loom Console base URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Your Loom Console origin, e.g. https://loom.contoso.com (no trailing path).

inputs.name: userOid
inputs.label: Acting user OID (x-user-oid)
inputs.helpMarkDown: The Entra object id (oid) of the tenant the deploy acts as. Becomes the pipeline owner/partition key.

inputs.name: loomToken
inputs.label: Loom CI Bearer token
inputs.helpMarkDown: Bearer token matching LOOM_CI_TOKEN (or LOOM_INTERNAL_TOKEN). Set this to a **secret** variable, e.g. $(LOOM_CI_TOKEN).

inputs.name: pipelineId
inputs.label: Pipeline id
inputs.helpMarkDown: The Loom deployment-pipeline id (uuid). Discover it with the LoomListPipelines task.

inputs.name: targetStageId
inputs.label: Target stage id
inputs.helpMarkDown: Stage id to promote INTO. Must be a distinct workspace from the source.

inputs.name: deployMode
inputs.label: Deploy mode
inputs.helpMarkDown: Full promotes all source items; Selective promotes only the items you list below.

inputs.name: note
inputs.label: Deploy note
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional note stored on the deploy receipt (history).

inputs.name: failOnPartial
inputs.label: Fail the task on a partial deploy
inputs.helpMarkDown: When some items deploy and others fail, fail the task (true) or mark it succeeded-with-issues (false).

outputVariables.name: deployedCount
outputVariables.description: Number of items promoted into the target stage.
